threats.title: API Token Spoofing via Weak JWT Secret
threats.description: The JWT secret defaults to 'demo-secret' if FIXOPS_JWT_SECRET is not set. An attacker who discovers this default can forge authentication tokens for any user.
mitigations: Generate random JWT secret on startup (already implemented)

threats.title: SSL/TLS Verification Bypass in MPTE HTTP Client
threats.description: micro_pentest.py disables SSL/TLS verification (verify=False) in HTTP requests, enabling MITM attacks against target systems during micro-pentest execution.
mitigations: Allow disable only in air-gapped mode

threats.title: Excessive Data Exposure in API Responses
threats.description: Brain pipeline API responses may expose internal data structures, stack traces, and implementation details to external consumers.
mitigations: Sanitize error responses in production mode
Remove debug info from production builds
threats.evidence: SELF-001, SELF-002 findings from SAST self-scan

threats.title: Rate Limiting Bypass on Critical Endpoints
threats.description: Evidence export and brain pipeline endpoints lack per-user rate limiting. An attacker could exhaust server resources by triggering expensive pipeline runs.
mitigations: Add per-user rate limiting (120 req/min exists globally)
Add endpoint-specific limits for expensive operations
threats.evidence: SELF-010 finding, rate limiting exists but is global

threats.title: Insecure Default CORS Configuration
threats.description: When FIXOPS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS is not set, CORS allows all origins, enabling cross-origin attacks from malicious websites.

threats.title: Unencrypted SQLite Database Storage
threats.description: 56 SQLite databases store findings, evidence, and configuration data without encryption at rest. Filesystem access reveals all data.
mitigations: Implement SQLCipher for encryption at rest
Restrict file permissions to process user
threats.evidence: SELF-012 finding, 56 .db files in data/ and .fixops_data/

threats.title: Supply Chain Risk via Unpinned Docker Packages
threats.description: Dockerfile uses unpinned apt-get packages, allowing supply chain attacks if package repositories are compromised.
threats.mitre_technique: T1195.002 (Supply Chain Compromise: Software Supply Chain)

threats.title: MCP Tool Injection via Malicious AI Agent
threats.description: MCP server exposes security tools to external AI agents. A malicious agent could inject crafted tool calls to trigger scans against unauthorized targets.

threats.title: Brain Pipeline Decisions Not Cryptographically Signed
threats.description: Brain pipeline decisions (triage, risk scoring, policy application) are not individually signed. An attacker with DB access could alter historical decisions without detection.
mitigations: Hash chain for decision audit trail

threats.title: AutoFix Code Injection via Malicious Finding Description
threats.description: AutoFix generates code patches based on finding descriptions. A crafted finding description could trick the LLM into generating malicious code that gets applied via autofix/apply.

threats.title: SSRF via DAST Scanner Target URL
threats.description: DAST scanner accepts target URLs for scanning. Without proper SSRF protection, it could be used to scan internal network resources.
mitigations: SSRF protection already blocks localhost/internal IPs (verified)
threats.evidence: DAST SSRF protection verified in regression testing

threats.title: RSA Key Regeneration Invalidates Previous Evidence
threats.description: Evidence signing uses RSA keys generated at startup. If the key is regenerated, all previously signed evidence bundles become unverifiable.
mitigations: Persist signing keys to secure storage
Key rotation with old key archive
Include public key in evidence bundle

threats.title: OpenAPI Schema Exposes All 759 Endpoints
threats.description: The /openapi.json endpoint exposes the complete API surface including internal endpoints, parameter schemas, and response models to unauthenticated users.
mitigations: Redact internal endpoints from public schema

threats.title: O(n^2) Graph Building in Brain Pipeline
threats.description: The build_graph step in brain_pipeline.py has O(n^2) complexity. Ingesting 10,000+ findings could cause extended processing times or OOM.
mitigations: Batch processing for large finding sets
threats.evidence: CLAUDE.md documents O(n^2) at graph step

threats.title: API Key in Frontend Source Code
threats.description: The VITE_API_KEY in suite-ui/aldeci/.env is bundled into the frontend JavaScript, exposing the API token to anyone viewing page source.

top_3_risks: TM-ALDECI-015: API Key in Frontend (risk=16, P0)
TM-ALDECI-002: SSL/TLS Bypass in MPTE (risk=12, P1)
